attacking_style: Attacks from breakaways at 1-2km to go, exploiting technical features (roundabouts, corners) with superior route choice and power. Loses effectiveness in pure sprints when launching too early.
team_tactics: Chronically suffers from leadout dysfunction across multiple teams (Astana, NTT, Dimension Data, Lotto-Jumbo) — either burned too early, collapsed entirely, or forced to freelance independently in finales.
terrain_preference: Excels on selective, classics-style terrain with reduced sprints after attrition. Technical finales with corners/roundabouts suit his route-reading ability. Struggles on flat pure sprints and long climbs where dropped before selections.
vulnerability: Launch timing deteriorates over three-week races (fading to 5th after 21 stages). Isolated when team tactics fail. Pure sprinters beat him when he launches prematurely from desperation or poor positioning.
key_patterns: Wins from breakaways using technical course knowledge, not bunch sprints (2017 TdF, 2019 Dauphiné victories).
Team leadout failures across four different squads forces frequent freelancing (2023, 2020, 2018, 2017 observations).
Retains explosive kick on hillier selective sprints, lacking endurance for pure flat speed (2019 Dauphiné, 2017 TdF).
Grand Tour fatigue visible: early launches and fading finishes after prolonged stage racing efforts.
Sub-1km technical attacks most effective weapon, exploiting corners and route choice over raw power.
form_trajectory: negative: No wins since 2019, reduced to lead-out role by 2023, repeated references to declining punch and tactical desperation across recent years
